headline: Kraft Heinz Unveils New Products in $600 Million Growth Push
summary: Company rolls out high-protein Mac & Cheese, snack Lunchables, and Capri Sun drink to revive key brands.

raw.headline: Kraft Heinz Unveils New Products in $600 Million Growth Push
raw.summary: Company rolls out high-protein Mac & Cheese, snack Lunchables, and Capri Sun drink to revive key brands.

headline: Kraft Heinz's About Turn and FCF Growth Leads To Huge Unusual Call Options Trading
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company reported strong free cash flow for Q4 on Feb. 11, and the new CEO stopped KHC's separation into two public companies. It has led to huge, unusual KHC call options activity.

raw.headline: Kraft Heinz's About Turn and FCF Growth Leads To Huge Unusual Call Options Trading
raw.summary: The Kraft Heinz Company reported strong free cash flow for Q4 on Feb. 11, and the new CEO stopped KHC's separation into two public companies. It has led to huge, unusual KHC call options activity.

headline: The Best Thing Ever Just Got Better: Kraft Mac & Cheese Unveils PowerMac, Offering Added Protein and Fiber with the Same Cheesiness Fans Know and Love
summary: PITTSBURGH & CHICAGO, March 17, 2026--Today, Kraft Mac & Cheese introduces PowerMac, a brand-new innovation delivering 17g of protein and 6g of fiber per serving. Kraft is known for bringing two icons – macaroni & cheese – together and making them the Best Thing Ever. Now, America's #1 mac & cheese1 is uniting the benefits consumers are seeking with the same cheesiness fans know and love. headline: Kraft Heinz leans into fiber, protein craze with new mac and cheese
summary: PowerMac, which took nearly a year to develop, is the latest innovation from a major food company looking to turn around sales with trendy ingredients.
